positive: A mystical, stylized forest creature, resembling a blend of a celestial fox and a jaguar, rendered in thick, clean silhouette lines and negative space style. The creature is coiled and centered in a dreamlike, symmetrical composition. It is surrounded by stylized bioluminescent foliage and glowing, geometric floral elements, creating a strong contrast against a deep indigo and forest green background. Highly detailed line art, vector illustration quality, minimalist yet intricate, perfect for apparel screen printing, high contrast, clean edges, mystic fantasy theme.
negative: low quality, blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, cropped, photo, realistic, 3d render, gradients, depth of field
